Metadata.title: SchoolGo Australia | Find the Best Schools
Metadata.description: Find the right Australian school — the first step to a great university and career. Compare fees, English tests, and entry requirements in seven languages.
Metadata.ogDescription: Search and compare the best schools across Australia.

ParentsMetadata.title: SchoolGo — Give your child the best Australian education
ParentsMetadata.description: Find the right Australian school for your child — the first step to a great university and career. Compare fees, English tests, and entry requirements across every registered school, in seven languages.
ParentsMetadata.ogDescription: Every registered school. Verified. In your language.

MarketingFooter.tagline: The right school. The right university. The right career. Connecting families across Asia-Pacific with Australia's best schools.
MarketingFooter.attribution: Sourced from data.gov.au · CC BY 2.5 AU · ESOS Act compliant

ParentsHero.lede: The right Australian school sets up the right university — and the right career. Search every registered K–12 school, compare fees, English tests, and boarding — in your language.

ParentsStatsBar.heading: Every registered school for international students. In one place.
ParentsStatsBar.subheading: No more searching across dozens of school websites, government registers, and agent brochures. Filter, compare, and shortlist — in your language.

ParentsFourSteps.heading: From first search to offer letter — four simple steps.
ParentsFourSteps.subheading: Transparent at every stage. No hidden fees. No login required until you apply.

browse.title: Browse every registered school
browse.description: Filter {count, number} schools by state, fees, curriculum, boarding, English tests, and scholarships — in Mandarin, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Malay, Bahasa, or English.

shortlist.title: Compare schools side by side
shortlist.description: Line up fees, intakes, accepted English tests, and entry requirements for up to five schools. Decide in minutes, not months.

prepare.title: See exactly what your child needs
prepare.description: Every school profile shows accepted English tests, minimum scores, required documents, and intake windows — so you know if your child qualifies before you apply.

apply.title: Connect with a trusted agent
apply.description: SchoolGo shows which education agents each school works with. Choose an agent who already knows the school, the admissions process, and what it takes to get in.

shortlist.title: Wei's shortlist
shortlist.subtitle: 3 schools in Victoria · All accept AEAS

ParentsVerified.heading: Every school has agents who know it best.
ParentsVerified.subheading: Don't rely on a single agent you haven't vetted. SchoolGo shows you which education agents each school actually works with — so you can choose someone with a track record at the schools you're considering.

ParentsComparison.heading: Put five schools next to each other.

ParentsPickATest.heading: Pick a test. See which schools accept it —
ParentsPickATest.subheading: Every school accepts different English tests at different levels. We map them all — so you can see at a glance which schools match your child's score.

aeas.description: Most commonly accepted by Australian independent schools

idat.description: Growing in popularity for K–12 admissions

ParentsSevenLanguages.heading: The Australian school system shouldn't feel like a mystery.
ParentsSevenLanguages.subheading: Fees, entry requirements, VCE, ATAR, boarding, welfare — everything explained in your language. SchoolGo is translated end-to-end into seven languages spoken by families across Asia-Pacific.

ParentsArticles.heading: Guides that answer the questions every family asks.
ParentsArticles.subheading: Visas, intakes, English tests, fee schedules, homestay, welfare — plain-language guides written by admissions officers. Free, no login.

englishTests.title: Which English test does your school accept?

boarding.title: Boarding vs day: what families choose and why

ParentsTrustBar.heading: Data you can trust.
ParentsTrustBar.subheading: Every school listed is verified against official Australian government registers — so you know you're looking at legitimate institutions.

cricos.label: Government-registered schools
cricos.description: Every school on SchoolGo is registered with the Australian Government to enrol international students.

datagov.label: Kept up to date
datagov.description: School data is refreshed regularly from official government registers — so what you see is current.

acara.label: National curriculum data
acara.description: Curriculum, school performance, and enrolment data sourced from Australia's national education authority.

esos.label: Student protection
esos.description: All schools listed operate under Australia's legal framework for protecting international students.

ParentsTrustBar.attribution: School data sourced from official Australian Government registers and the national curriculum authority (ACARA). Updated April 2026.

free.question: Is SchoolGo free?
free.answer: Yes. SchoolGo is completely free for parents, education agents, and schools. There are no listing fees, application fees, or subscription costs.

dataSource.question: Where does the school data come from?
dataSource.answer: All school listings come from the Australian Government's official register of schools approved to enrol international students. We cross-reference this with national school profile data for enrolment figures, performance scores, and locations.

englishTests.question: What English proficiency tests do Australian schools accept?
englishTests.answer: Different schools accept different tests. The most common are AEAS (Australian Education Assessment Services), iDAT (International Digital Admissions Test), Duolingo English Test, IELTS, and PTE Academic. SchoolGo shows which specific tests each school accepts on their profile page.

doINeedAgent.question: Do I need an education agent?
doINeedAgent.answer: You don't have to use one, but most families do — and it's free. Education agents help you choose the right school, prepare documents, and manage the application process. SchoolGo shows which agents each school works with, so you can pick someone with a proven track record — not just whoever found you first.

updateFrequency.question: How often is the data updated?
updateFrequency.answer: School data is refreshed regularly from official government sources. Schools that have claimed their profile can update their own fees, requirements, and intake dates at any time.

ParentsFinalCta.subheading: The right school. The right university. The right career. Start searching — free, no login required.

AgentsMetadata.title: SchoolGo — Your entire pipeline. One platform.
AgentsMetadata.description: Free tools for education agents placing students into Australian schools. Manage your pipeline, send structured applications, build your reputation.
AgentsMetadata.ogDescription: Your entire pipeline. One platform. Free for every agent.

AgentsHero.lede: Stop juggling WeChat threads, WhatsApp groups, and spreadsheets. Every student, every document, every application — one system, from first enquiry to offer letter. Free for every agent.

AgentsPainPoints.heading: You're the backbone of international admissions. Your tools should act like it.
AgentsPainPoints.subheading: 76% of international school enrolments come through education agents. SchoolGo is built to make you more effective, not to replace you.

email.question: Scattered across WeChat, WhatsApp, and email?
email.answer: One platform replaces the chaos. Stop copying student details between WeChat threads, WhatsApp groups, and email chains. Every application carries your verified agent attribution — automatically.

status.question: Can't see what needs attention today?
status.answer: A daily action queue shows which applications need a follow-up, which documents are expiring, and which families are waiting for an update. No more scrolling through threads to figure out where you left off.

trust.question: Drowning in documents — or worse, fraudulent ones?
trust.answer: Families upload passports, test scores, and school reports once. Everything is organised, version-controlled, and tracked for expiry. English scores are verified against official records — so you never unknowingly submit a forged report.

requirements.question: Re-entering the same student data for every school?
requirements.answer: Enter a student's profile once. SchoolGo maps it to each school's requirements and generates applications — no more re-keying names, dates, and passport numbers across different forms.

AgentsMatching.heading: Family calls at 10am. Three matched schools by 10:30.
AgentsMatching.subheading: A school search tool built for professional use — filter by intake, year level, English threshold, fees, and boarding. Compare schools side by side, then submit one application that works for any school.

listen.title: Capture what the family wants
listen.description: Budget, location, English level, desired intake — in one form, in their language.

match.title: See best-fit schools
match.description: Filtered by your student's profile. See accepted tests and minimum scores per school.

deliver.title: Deliver a shortlist, not a mess
deliver.description: A branded PDF the family can screenshot and send to Dad. No PDFs from fifteen different schools.

AgentsCommission.heading: You keep 100% of your school commission.
AgentsCommission.subheading: SchoolGo is free for everyone — parents, agents, and schools. Your commercial relationship with schools stays direct.
AgentsCommission.statLabel: Platform cost per agent. Zero fees, zero commission splits — ever.

zero.title: Zero per-student fees
zero.description: No commission split. No placement fee. No subscription. Bulk-import your existing student list and start immediately.

direct.title: Direct relationship with schools
direct.description: Your attribution is locked to the application the moment you submit.

audit.title: Full audit trail
audit.description: Every status change timestamped. Multiple counsellors work in their own queue; admin sees everything across branches.

AgentsQeacTrust.heading: Build your reputation with every placement.
AgentsQeacTrust.subheading: Every agent on SchoolGo builds a public track record — placement history, school relationships, and verified English score submissions. QEAC-certified agents get an additional credential badge, but every agent's results speak for themselves.

AgentsScale.heading: Agents across APAC are joining. Be one of the first.
AgentsScale.subheading: From Shanghai to Jakarta, Ho Chi Minh to Seoul — solo agents and multi-branch agencies placing families into Australian K–12.

AgentsTestimonial.heading: What agents are saying

a.quote: I used to forward 40 PDFs a week between parents on WeChat and six admissions offices over email. One platform would cut my admin in half.

b.quote: My families want updates at 11pm their time. A live tracker they can check themselves would save me two hours a day on WhatsApp.
b.attribution: Independent agent, Ho Chi Minh City

c.quote: I re-type the same passport number into five different school forms every week. Enter-once, apply-many would change everything.

AgentsTestimonial.disclaimer: Composite quotes based on agent interviews

AgentsFinalCta.subheading: Free. Instant onboarding. One system for every student, every school, every document.

SchoolsMetadata.title: SchoolGo — Grow your international cohort. Simplify admissions.
SchoolsMetadata.description: Reach qualified international families. Receive complete, verified applications with checked English scores. Approve the agents you trust. Free for all schools.
SchoolsMetadata.ogDescription: Grow your international cohort. Simplify admissions.

SchoolsHero.lede: Reach qualified international families. Receive complete applications with verified English scores and documents — in one inbox, in a standard format. Free for every school.

SchoolsStats.heading: One profile. Seen by families around the world.
SchoolsStats.subheading: Your listing appears in every search, every comparison, every matched shortlist — translated into seven languages. Reach new markets and diversify your international cohort.

SchoolsThreeTools.heading: Three tools. One goal: the right students, with less work.
SchoolsThreeTools.subheading: SchoolGo gives your admissions team the three things they actually need.

profile.title: A living school profile
profile.description: Fees, intakes, accepted English tests and minimum scores, scholarships, and documents — all updated by you, displayed in the family's language. You control how your school appears.

applications.title: Complete, verified applications
applications.description: Every application arrives complete: verified agent attribution, required documents, and English scores checked against official records. No more chasing missing paperwork or processing fraudulent reports.

inbox.title: A single admissions inbox
inbox.description: Offer, waitlist, or decline in one click. Approve agents you trust, block ones you don't. Track profile views, enquiry sources, and agent performance from one dashboard.

SchoolsTimeline.heading: From first application to first day of term — without the inbox soup.
SchoolsTimeline.subheading: Every step of the international admissions lifecycle, in one place.

receive.title: Receive
receive.description: Application lands in your inbox — complete with verified English scores, required documents, and agent attribution. No more chasing missing paperwork across email threads.

review.title: Review
review.description: Your team assesses against your own rubric. Notes stay internal.

decide.title: Decide
decide.description: Offer, waitlist, or decline in one click. Status flows to family and agent instantly.

onboard.title: Onboard
onboard.description: Share intake-day paperwork, accommodation info, and orientation links — all in one thread.

SchoolsPricing.heading: Free for every school.
SchoolsPricing.subheading: SchoolGo is free for everyone — parents, agents, and schools. No listing fees, no per-student fees, no commissions.

features.a: Your school profile, auto-published from government data
features.b: Visible to families and agents across Asia-Pacific
features.c: Accepted English tests and minimum scores displayed

features.a: Full control over your school profile and photos
features.d: Approve or block agents · View analytics

SchoolsTestimonial.quote: The hardest part of international admissions isn't finding students — it's processing incomplete applications from 15 different email threads. A standardised inbox would change everything.
SchoolsTestimonial.attribution: Composite quote based on admissions officer interviews

SchoolsFinalCta.subheading: Free listing. No credit card. Claim takes 10 minutes.

Footer.tagline: Connecting future leaders with the best academic foundations across the continent.

claim.question: How do I claim my school's profile?
claim.answer: Search for your school on SchoolGo and click "Claim This School." You'll verify your identity as a staff member, and once approved you can edit your profile, update fees, and manage applications.

agents.question: How does SchoolGo work with education agents?
agents.answer: By default, your profile works with your school's existing agents. You can see which agents have placed students with you, invite new agents, or manage agent relationships from your dashboard.

commission.question: Does SchoolGo charge schools or agents?
commission.answer: No. SchoolGo is free for everyone — schools, agents, and parents. There are no listing fees, per-student fees, or commission splits.

data.question: Where does the school data come from?
data.answer: All school profiles are auto-published from CRICOS (the Australian Government's official register) and cross-referenced with ACARA school profile data. Schools that claim their profile can update their own details at any time.

LaunchingSoon.title: We're launching soon
LaunchingSoon.subtitle: SchoolGo is getting ready to help you find the best schools across Australia. We're putting the finishing touches on something great.
LaunchingSoon.stayTuned: Stay tuned — we'll be live before you know it.
